acceptance_criteria.description: Users must not be able to access any page without first logging in with valid credentials. Attempting to access a protected page without authentication should not succeed.
kane_steps: Open https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html without logging in
Observe that the user is not granted access to the inventory page
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page

acceptance_criteria.description: After entering valid credentials (standard_user / secret_sauce) and submitting the login form, the user is redirected to the product inventory page.
kane_steps: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
Enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'
Click the Login button
Verify the user is redirected to the inventory page (/inventory.html)
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Successful login redirects to inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The inventory page displays product tiles, each containing the product name, an image, and a price.
kane_steps: Log in with valid credentials
Navigate to the inventory page
Verify each product tile displays a product name, an image, and a price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Inventory tiles show name, image, and price

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product name on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click on a product name link
Verify the product detail page opens and displays the correct product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product name opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product image on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click on a product image
Verify the product detail page opens and displays the correct product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product image opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page displays the product name, description, price, and an 'Add to cart' button.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click on any product to open its detail page
Verify the page shows the product name, description, price, and an 'Add to cart' button
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Detail page shows name, description, price, button

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can add a product to the cart from the inventory page by clicking the 'Add to cart' button on a product tile.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the 'Add to cart' button on any product tile
Verify the product is added to the cart
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart button adds product from inventory

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking 'Add to cart' on the inventory page, the button label for that product changes to 'Remove'.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the 'Add to cart' button on a product tile
Verify the button label for that product changes to 'Remove'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart button label changes to Remove

acceptance_criteria.description: After adding a product to the cart, the cart badge in the top navigation updates to reflect the current number of items in the cart.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Note the cart badge count (initially absent or zero)
Click 'Add to cart' on one product
Verify the cart badge now displays '1'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart badge updates with item count

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can remove a product from the cart directly on the inventory page by clicking the 'Remove' button on a product tile that was previously added.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on the same product tile
Navigate to the cart page and verify the product is no longer listed
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button removes product from inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking 'Remove' on the inventory page, the button label for that product changes back to 'Add to cart'.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on that product tile
Verify the button label reverts to 'Add to cart'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button label reverts to Add to cart

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can navigate to the cart page at /cart.html.
kane_steps: Log in with valid credentials
Click the cart icon in the top navigation
Verify the browser navigates to /cart.html

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart page lists all products that have been added to the cart, showing each item's name, quantity, and price.
kane_steps: Log in and add one or more products to the cart from the inventory page
Navigate to /cart.html
Verify each added product is listed with its name, quantity, and price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart page lists items with name, quantity, price

acceptance_criteria.description: The inventory page provides a sort dropdown in the top right that allows users to select a sorting option.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Locate the sort dropdown in the top right of the page
Click the dropdown and verify all four sort options are displayed: Name (A to Z), Name (Z to A), Price (low to high), Price (high to low)
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown present with four sort options

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown displays the cheapest product (Sauce Labs Onesie at $7.99) as the first item.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product tile displayed is 'Sauce Labs Onesie' priced at $7.99
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Price low to high sorts cheapest product first

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Name (A to Z)' from the sort dropdown displays 'Sauce Labs Backpack' as the first product in the list.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Name (A to Z)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product tile displayed is 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Name A to Z sorts Backpack first

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Name (Z to A)' from the sort dropdown reorders products in reverse alphabetical order.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Name (Z to A)' from the sort dropdown
Verify products are displayed in reverse alphabetical order by name
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Name Z to A sorts products reverse alphabetically

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Price (high to low)' from the sort dropdown reorders products so the most expensive product appears first.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Price (high to low)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product tile displayed is the most expensive product in the catalog
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Price high to low sorts most expensive product first
